chapter_title.ar: باب الْجُنُبِ يَأْكُلُ وَ يَشْرَبُ وَ يَقْرَأُ وَ يَدْخُلُ الْمَسْجِدَ وَ يَخْتَضِبُ وَ يَدَّهِنُ وَ يَطَّلِي وَ يَحْتَجِمُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 33 – The one with sexual impurity eats and drinks, and recites (the Quran), and enters the Masjid, and dyes (hair), and massages, and coats (with henna etc.), and gets cupping done

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/150)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/150)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الْجُنُبُ يَدَّهِنُ ثُمَّ يَغْتَسِلُ قَالَ لَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Abdullah Bin Bahr, from Hareyz who said,
‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘The one with sexual impurity massages (with oil), then washes’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No’.
en.sarwar: 6. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id from ‘Abd Allah ibn Bahr from Hariz who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘Can one after experiencing sexual relation, rub oil, then take Ghusl (bath). He (the Imam) said, ‘No, (it is not permissible).”’
